jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Plum
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Plum! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Plum:
Plum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum!
